roles.name: Mission Architect
roles.description: Designs the over-arching mission solution — orbital mechanics, hardware, and software stitched into one flight plan.

roles.name: Flight Director
roles.description: Owns the timeline from T-minus to splashdown — coordinates every console in Mission Control.

roles.name: Capsule Communicator
roles.description: Keeps the records straight, speaks to the crew, and stewards the platform's day-to-day configuration.

roles.name: Propulsion Engineer
roles.description: Builds the engines — Apex, LWC, and platform features that get the mission to orbit.

roles.name: Chief Astronaut
roles.description: Heads the Astronaut Office — sets standards across all crewed missions and mentors the senior corps.

roles.name: Mission Specialist
roles.description: Trained for the deep work — payload operations, EVAs, and the most complex configuration tasks.

roles.name: Payload Specialist
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration into orbit under the Mission Specialist's direction.

roles.name: Lead Systems Integrator
roles.description: Architect of the bridges between flight systems — every interface from launch tower to docking port.

roles.name: Avionics Engineer
roles.description: Lays the wiring of API, middleware, and event flows under the Lead Integrator's plan.

roles.name: Telemetry Technician
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts, and the careful handling of downlink errors.

roles.name: Quality Assurance Inspector
roles.description: Tends to readiness — finds the faults in the build before they reach the launch pad.

roles.name: Public Affairs Officer
roles.description: Lifts the banner of the agency — leads all messaging from press kit to live broadcast.

roles.name: Mission Press Liaison
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call to gather attention and convert interest.

roles.name: Outreach Coordinator
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into classrooms and newsrooms — content, creative, and the daily cadence.

roles.name: Mission Planner
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between the customer and the engineering corps.

roles.name: Senior Propulsion Engineer
roles.description: Master of the deep build — leads complex Apex, LWC, and architecture work for the most senior missions.

roles.name: Astronaut Candidate
roles.description: Rookie of the corps — learns the ropes through hands-on configuration under close supervision.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

mercury-gemini.name: Astronaut Selection Board
mercury-gemini.description: Discovery sign-off — the Mercury Seven announced to the world.

mercury-gemini.name: Freedom 7 Suborbital
mercury-gemini.description: Build kickoff: Shepard's 15-minute hop proves the capsule.

mercury-gemini.name: Friendship 7 Orbits Earth
mercury-gemini.description: Mid-project gate: Glenn becomes the first American in orbit.

mercury-gemini.name: Gemini IV Spacewalk
mercury-gemini.description: Phase invoice trigger: Ed White's first American EVA.

mercury-gemini.name: Gemini VIII Docking
mercury-gemini.description: Build complete: Armstrong & Scott achieve first orbital docking.

mercury-gemini.name: Gemini XII Splashdown
mercury-gemini.description: Go-Live: program closes, lessons captured for Apollo.

mercury-gemini.name: Program Hand-off to Apollo
mercury-gemini.description: Hyper-care close: rendezvous and EVA techniques transferred.

apollo-program.name: Apollo 1 Pad Review
apollo-program.description: Project kickoff: hard lessons learned, program rebuilt around safety.

apollo-program.name: Apollo 8 Earthrise
apollo-program.description: Build phase: first crewed lunar orbit — Borman, Lovell, Anders.

apollo-program.name: Apollo 11 Tranquility Base
apollo-program.description: Go-Live: 'The Eagle has landed' — Armstrong & Aldrin walk on the Moon.

apollo-program.name: Apollo 13 Successful Failure
apollo-program.description: UAT gate: 'Houston, we have a problem' — crew returned safely.

apollo-program.name: Apollo 17 Last Lunar EVA
apollo-program.description: Final crewed lunar mission: Cernan and Schmitt close the surface program.

apollo-program.name: Splashdown of Apollo 17
apollo-program.description: Final invoice: lunar surface program complete.

apollo-program.name: Skylab Hand-off
apollo-program.description: Hyper-care close: hardware repurposed for orbital workshop.

space-shuttle.name: STS-1 Wheels Stop
space-shuttle.description: Discovery: Young & Crippen prove the orbiter on Columbia's first flight.

space-shuttle.name: First Female Commander Selected
space-shuttle.description: Build: Eileen Collins assigned to STS-93 — diversity milestone.

space-shuttle.name: Hubble Servicing Mission 1
space-shuttle.description: Mid-project gate: Musgrave's crew restores Hubble's vision on STS-61.

space-shuttle.name: ISS Assembly Begins
space-shuttle.description: Build phase: Endeavour delivers Unity Node — orbital assembly underway.

space-shuttle.name: Return to Flight
space-shuttle.description: Go-Live: STS-114 returns the fleet to safe operations under Eileen Collins.

space-shuttle.name: STS-135 Final Landing
space-shuttle.description: Final invoice: Atlantis closes the 30-year shuttle program.

iss-modern.name: Expedition Selection Board
iss-modern.description: Kickoff: long-duration crew selected for the next increment.

iss-modern.name: Year in Space Begins
iss-modern.description: Discovery: Scott Kelly & Mikhail Kornienko start the 340-day mission.

iss-modern.name: First All-Female Spacewalk
iss-modern.description: Build: Christina Koch and Jessica Meir complete the historic EVA.

iss-modern.name: Demo-2 Crew Dragon Docking
iss-modern.description: UAT acceptance: Hurley & Behnken arrive aboard the first commercial crew flight.

iss-modern.name: Year-Long Mission Splashdown
iss-modern.description: Go-Live: Kelly returns — biomedical data transitions to flight surgeons.

iss-modern.name: Increment Hand-over
iss-modern.description: Hyper-care close: command of the station handed to the next expedition.

iss-modern.name: Final Mission Invoice
iss-modern.description: Final invoice: science yield and operational metrics reconciled.

Alan Shepard.notes: Grounded for Ménière's disease — medical leave to recover his flight status.

John Glenn.notes: Senate campaign trail — Ohio constituents to meet.

Gus Grissom.notes: Indiana fishing trip — earned after the Liberty Bell 7 hatch ordeal.

Ed White.notes: West Point reunion with the class of 1952.

Neil Armstrong.notes: Quiet farm time in Ohio — declined yet another speaking engagement.

Buzz Aldrin.notes: MIT seminar — orbital rendezvous lecture series.

Sally Ride.notes: Sally Ride Science workshop with middle-school girls.

Chris Hadfield.notes: Recording session — guitar and orbital photography projects.

Story Musgrave.notes: Sixth graduate degree coursework — chasing another diploma.

Scott Kelly.notes: Post-flight rehab — readjusting to gravity after 340 days on orbit.

Christina Koch.notes: Artemis II crew briefings — preparing for lunar flyby.
